\tzpentry{ID4221}{Boundary Magnetic Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4221 introduces Boundary Magnetic Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \vec{B}_{\text{boundary}}(\theta,\phi,t) = B_{\text{amp}} \sum_{l=0}^{\infty}\sum_{m=-l}^{l} c_{lm} Y_l^m(\theta,\phi) \text{sgn}[\sin(n_\theta\theta)\sin(n_\phi\phi)] e^{i\omega t}\hat{r} \end{equation}
